  • Method Details

    • getControlPainter

      public ControlPainter getControlPainter()

    • createPredicateText

      private void createPredicateText()

    • append

      public void append(boolean odd)

    • attachButtons

      public void attachButtons()

    • createControlButtons

      private void createControlButtons(boolean odd)

    • dispose

      public void dispose()
      Utility method to dispose the composites and check boxes.

    • isSelected

      public boolean isSelected()
      Tells if the hypothesis is selected or not.
      Returns:
      true if the row is selected, and false otherwise

    • apply

      protected void apply(TacticApplicationProxy<?> tacticAppli)
      Applies the given tactic application to the predicate held by this row.
      Parameters:
      tacticAppli - the tactic application

    • instantiate

      protected void instantiate()
      Instantiates the given predicate with the current value of the inputs. This method applies allmpD (if applicable) or allE on an hypothesis, and exI on a goal.

    • apply

      protected void apply(ICommandApplication commandAppli)
      Applies the command to the predicate held by this row.
      Parameters:
      commandAppli - the command application

    • getPredicate

      public Predicate getPredicate()
      Get the contained predicate.
      Returns:
      the predicate corresponding to this row

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Tells if the predicate row appears activated (i.e. the current proof tree node is open)
      Returns:
      true if the current proof tree node where this predicate comes from is open, false otherwise

    • isGoal

      public boolean isGoal()
      Tells if the predicate held by this row is the goal of a sequent.
      Returns:
      true if the current the predicate of this row is a goal, false otherwise

    • getUserSupport

      public IUserSupport getUserSupport()
      Returns the user support from which the predicate has been computed.
      Returns:
      the current user support

    • setSelected

      public void setSelected(boolean selected)
      Selects this row by checking the checkbox button. The checkbox button is rendered (i.e. created and packed) if it has not yet been created.
      Parameters:
      selected - the selection

    • getNbTabsFromLeft

      public int getNbTabsFromLeft()
      Returns the number of tabulations and controls that are making a left margin.
      Returns:
      the number of tabulations and controls in the left margin

    • getPredicateText

      public EventBPredicateText getPredicateText()
      Returns the predicate text object of this row.
      Returns:
      the pretty print and display object of the predicate held by this row

    • getProverUI

      public ProverUI getProverUI()
      Returns the parent prover UI.
      Returns:
      the parent prover UI
